text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Alex?
Actually, I'm Drew Nguyen. I was hoping to get some information about my appointment.
Please provide wins full name and date of birth.
My name is Drew Nguyen, and my date of birth is 10/03/1979.
just to confirm, I have your name as Drew noen and your date of birth as October 3rd 1979
It's actually Nguyen, not Noen. But yes, my date of birth is correct.
